W10D-mps-no-jit-index.notes: compute_area_profits bounded position indexing by prices.shape[0]; under NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT=1 strict-Python bounds checks raised IndexError when positions length < prices length. Fixed by introducing n_pos = positions.shape[0] separate from n_prices = prices.shape[0]. Output array length preserved (n_prices) so downstream callers that do profits[:-1] keep working. Sensor has 3 tests: direct compute_area_profits call, end-to-end find_maximum_profit_system, and a subprocess sensor with NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT=1 that catches the regression even when the parent pytest process has JIT enabled. Pre-fix subprocess sensor RED; post-fix all 3 GREEN. All 18 mps-related tests pass.

W10D-biz-njit-poly-eval-skipif.notes: Added @pytest.mark.skipif(os.environ.get('NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT') == '1') gate on test_biz_njit_poly_eval_3x_faster_than_numpy_at_n2k. Verified: passes under JIT enabled, SKIPPED under NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT=1. Other biz_njit_* tests in the file are not perf-floor assertions and stay enabled.

W10D-cross-pkg-underscore-allowlist-drai.notes:

  4. mlframe.training._ram_helpers symbols -> already in mlframe.training __all__; consumer switched (_rfecv_fit.py)
  5. mlframe.feature_selection.filters._prewarm.prewarm_fs_numba_cache -> already exposed at filters __init__; consumer switched (_core_numba_warmup.py)
  6. mlframe.training._format.short_model_tag / strip_shim_suffix -> mlframe.training (added to lazy imports + __all__); consumer switched (_ensembling_score.py - note: the file was also being refactored by another agent in parallel; my edit landed cleanly inside their carve)
  7. mlframe.feature_selection.filters._kernel_tuning.get_kernel_tuning_cache -> mlframe.feature_selection.filters.get_kernel_tuning_cache (consumer: _composite_transforms_nonlinear.py)
  9. mlframe.feature_selection.wrappers._rfecv.RFECV -> already exposed at wrappers __init__; consumer switched (_feature_selection_config.py)
ALLOWLIST is now empty (set()). Meta-test test_no_new_underscore_imports_cross_package + test_underscore_imports_allowlist_is_not_stale both GREEN.
